purpose: Declares the persisted plugin settings (mermaid on/off, scroll sync on/off, auto-open markdown on/off, render debounce in ms) and the PluginOptionsStore that round-trips them through a private INI file in Notepad++'s plugin config directory.
exports: struct markdownplusplus::PluginOptions { mermaidEnabled=true, scrollSyncEnabled=true, autoOpenMarkdown=true, renderDebounceMs=140 }
invariants: ClampRenderDebounceMs clamps to [0, 1000]; both Load and Save run values through it.
An empty path_ disables persistence: Load returns defaults, Save is a no-op.
